reviews.comment:
La estacion es hermosa y compre recuerdos Patagonicos en el shop.Por favor, si pasan por Sierra Grande, tomense unos minutos para visitar playas doradas.

(Translated by Google)
The station is beautiful, and you can buy Patagonian souvenirs in the shop. Please, if you pass through Sierra Grande, take a few minutes to visit the golden beaches.
